narrative:
Leesburg (precinct in Union County) has 993 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.1 percentage points.
